overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic horror game showing a character walking along a foggy rural road toward a lakeside construction site. The atmosphere is misty and ominous with low visibility, featuring parked vehicles, construction equipment, and workers near a waterfront with a distant lighthouse.

two-lane asphalt road with double yellow lines
dense evergreen trees lining both sides of the road

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a foggy forest road flanked by dense pine trees. A gray sedan is parked on the right shoulder, and through the mist, motorcycles and an orange traffic barrel are visible further down the road.

events.description: passing the red pickup truck parked on the left side
approaching the road barricade and construction workers ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing forward past vehicles toward the construction worksite

group of workers in work clothes near the roadside

segments.scene_description: The character passes a red pickup truck on the left and approaches a construction area where workers stand near a road barricade. The orange traffic barrel moves to the right foreground as the character advances toward the worksite.

events.description: transitioning from asphalt road to wooden boardwalk at the water's edge
lighthouse becomes visible on the cliff across the misty lake

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront observing the lighthouse and misty lake

notable_agents.action: worker in red plaid shirt standing near the shoreline

segments.scene_description: The scene opens to a wide waterfront view as the character steps onto a wooden boardwalk. A lighthouse emerges through the mist on a distant cliff, and the calm lake water reflects the foggy atmosphere while birch trees line the path.

events.description: worker in red plaid shirt and hard hat approaches and gestures toward the character
character turns around to walk back toward the road

agents.ego_description: stopping to face the approaching worker, then turning to walk back toward the road

notable_agents.action: construction worker in red plaid shirt and orange hard hat approaching to interact

entered.detail: stacks of wooden lumber and construction materials

segments.scene_description: A construction worker in a red plaid shirt and hard hat approaches the character on the boardwalk near piles of lumber. After a brief interaction, the character turns around to head back, with the lighthouse and lake now behind them.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic, foggy forest road that gradually opens into a wide, misty lakeside construction site. It begins with the character walking past dense pine trees and a parked gray sedan, moving through the haze toward distant motorcycles and an orange traffic barrel. As the character advances, the scene shifts past a red pickup truck and toward a road barricade where workers are gathered, with the traffic barrel sliding into the foreground. The environment then expands onto a wooden boardwalk, revealing a calm lake and a distant lighthouse emerging from the mist among a line of birch trees. Finally, the camera lingers as a worker in a red plaid shirt approaches near piles of lumber before the character turns around to head back toward the forest.
